messageBody:
You can now enter your shifts, oncall duties or both.
Please use the Select Duty Mode toggle at the top of the Shift Entry dialog box.
When you submit your shift data you can now also submit your oncall duty data!

What's New:
  • Added oncall logging
  • Bank Holidays now have a golden border
  • Oncall - standby have a light blue border
  • Oncall callouts have a dark blue border
  • Calendar should look better on mobile phones
